{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Herald-level Striker technique
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|A [[Herald-level Striker technique]] was mentioned by [[Mercy]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
